title: citrus × limetta var. parva
intro: Citrus × limetta var. parva, also known as the Fingered Citron, is a small, thorny shrub native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, finger-shaped fruits. The medicinal properties of Citrus × limetta var. parva include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Citrus × limetta var. parva include teas, infusions, and oils, which can be used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
